ha402d447g39e7g4cb5g8faeg704ad1128be0: You're lucky - you can go wherever you want.
h7575d50eg83fcg45f0g8eb9g34a14f25a177: It smells bad out here. I want to go home.
h18bcb8a1g2c5cg4f0dg9a2dg9f2a7d7f7579: You look all tough, but you're still in here, hiding with us children.
hd9b39937gc697g4995gb448g0e7e4cfab547: You know how to fight, right? You should be out there, helping!
